channel.title: Abhishek Vasudev — Blog
channel.description: Abhishek Vasudev is a Senior iOS Engineer and SwiftUI Developer based in London. Expert in Swift, iOS development, and building scalable mobile applications at Expedia Group.

item.title: WWDC 2025 — A Bold New Era for Apple
item.description: Keynote highlights, developer takeaways, and what WWDC 2025 means for iOS teams — from Liquid Glass to on-device Apple Intelligence.
item.author: Abhishek Vasudev

item.title: iOSDevUK Conference — Talks, Trains, and Takeaways
item.description: A recap of iOSDevUK in Aberystwyth, Wales — from Xcode Cloud and Swift macros to my lightning talk on NTTI performance metrics.
item.author: Abhishek Vasudev

item.title: Swift Anytime Delhi Meetup — My First Talk
item.description: Recap of my first in-person iOS meetup in Gurgaon — attending as a speaker, giving a lightning talk on my career journey, and connecting with Delhi's iOS community.
item.author: Abhishek Vasudev
